name: IgnoreMessageEvent
documentation:
Metric event published when a tracked message matched a handler but was deliberately skipped before invocation.

This is distinct from a handler failure: no handler method was invoked and no handler result should be expected.

fields.name: EXPIRED_REQUEST
fields.documentation: Reason emitted when an indexed request is skipped because its effective timeout expired before handler invocation.

fields.name: MISSING_PROTECTED_DATA
fields.documentation: Reason emitted when a handler is skipped because referenced protected data is no longer available.

fields.name: consumer
fields.documentation: Name of the consumer or local handler context that ignored the message.

fields.name: handler
fields.documentation: Simple name of the handler class that would have handled the message.

fields.name: messageIndex
fields.documentation: Index of the ignored message, when available.

fields.name: messageType
fields.documentation: Type of message that was ignored.

fields.name: payloadType
fields.documentation: Payload type or route descriptor of the ignored message.

fields.name: reason
fields.documentation: Machine-readable reason for ignoring the message.

fields.name: topic
fields.documentation: Topic of the ignored message, when available.
